description.ko: 소용돌이치는 인디고 성운 속에서 별빛을 집어삼키는 우주 공간의 웅장하고도 두려운 풍경입니다.
description.en: A majestic and terrifying view of a cosmic void devouring starlight within a swirling indigo nebula.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-high-definition shot of VOID-3, depicting the 'Event Horizon of the Ancients.' A central black hole is surrounded by a swirling accretion disk of #3D1A78 deep violet and #7B68EE indigo gravitational energy. Faint #E6E6FA lavender nebula clouds drift through the infinite #0D0221 obsidian abyss, with light from distant galaxies stretching due to gravitational lensing. 8k resolution, photorealistic cosmic dust, volumetric lighting, capturing the silent majesty of the universe.
